message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.

I’m an AI agent for Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I understand you want to clear the Nira loan ending ****4831 but cannot pay the full amount today. I’ve noted that position and your existing contact preference. I’ll complete the assessment here and route this for the next team to review approved options, if any. We will avoid unnecessary follow-up.

Thanks. Please note this is temporary—I can make a small payment now, and after my salary is credited I can discuss a realistic payment plan.

Your current timing can be recorded for hardship review, but I cannot confirm an approved plan or reduced-closure structure from the available data in this turn. Nira policy does not allow extensions beyond 30 days. I’ve noted that you can make a small payment now and want to discuss a realistic plan after your salary credit on 2026-04-20. Per your contact preference, you should only be contacted if a concrete approved option is available.
